description: Skill registry for MiganCore — declarative tool definitions with permission model.

skills.name: Memory Write
skills.description: Write a fact to long-term memory

skills.name: Memory Search
skills.description: Search long-term memory semantically via Qdrant

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Search the web for current or external information. Prefer ONAMIX Search for broad browsing, but keep this lightweight DuckDuckGo fallback available for agents that explicitly reference web_search.

skills.name: Python REPL
skills.description: Execute short Python snippets in the API container subprocess sandbox. Use for calculations, data transforms, and lightweight local automation.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds, capped by executor

skills.name: Read File
skills.description: MANDATORY for reading file content: invoke this function whenever the user asks to read, open, view, show, or check the content of a file. Returns the file contents as text (capped at 50KB). For directory listings, pass a directory path.

skills.name: Generate Image
skills.description: MANDATORY for image generation: invoke this function whenever the user requests an image, picture, illustration, visual, artwork, banner, or any visual asset. Do NOT describe the image or generate code — call this function directly. Uses fal.ai FLUX schnell, returns a URL to the generated image (~3-8s).

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image to generate

skills.name: Text to Speech
skills.description: MANDATORY for voice/audio output: invoke this function whenever the user asks for audio narration, spoken response, or text-to-speech. Generates MP3 via ElevenLabs (free tier 10k chars/month). Returns base64-encoded audio.

text.description: Text to synthesize (max 2500 chars per call)

voice_id.description: Optional ElevenLabs voice ID. Default: Rachel (21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM)

skills.name: Write File
skills.description: MANDATORY for creating/writing files: invoke this function whenever the user asks to create, write, save, or generate a file (script, config, document, code, etc.). Do NOT describe the action or instruct the user to do it manually — call this function directly. Creates parent directories automatically. Sandboxed to agent's workspace.

path.description: File path relative to workspace (e.g. 'script.py' or 'src/main.py')

content.description: Text content to write to the file

skills.name: Analyze Image
skills.description: MANDATORY when the user attaches, references, or asks about an image: invoke this function to describe the image content, transcribe text in it, or answer specific questions about what is shown. Bilingual ID/EN. Backed by Gemini 2.5 Flash Vision (cheap, fast) with Claude Sonnet 4.5 fallback.

image_url.description: HTTPS URL to the image (jpg/png/webp). Provide either this or image_base64.

image_base64.description: Base64-encoded image bytes. Use only when no URL is available.

mime_type.description: Image mime type (e.g. 'image/jpeg', 'image/png'). Required if using image_base64.

question.description: What to ask about the image. Default: 'Describe this image in detail.'
question.default: Describe this image in detail. List notable elements and any visible text.

lang.description: Response language: 'id' for Indonesian, 'en' for English.

skills.name: Web Read
skills.description: MANDATORY when user shares a URL or asks to read/summarize web content. Fetches the URL via Jina Reader and returns clean LLM-friendly markdown — no scripts, ads, or navigation noise. Use this INSTEAD of http_get when the goal is reading/understanding a web page.

no_cache.description: Bypass Jina CDN cache for fresh content.

skills.name: Export PDF
skills.description: MANDATORY when user asks to download/export/save content as PDF. Renders markdown to a styled PDF document via WeasyPrint. Returns base64 PDF + data URL ready for download anchor.

skills.name: Export Slides
skills.description: MANDATORY when user asks for a slide deck / presentation / PPTX / slides. Renders markdown (Marp syntax with --- between slides) to PPTX/PDF/HTML. Returns base64 file + data URL ready for download.

markdown.description: Marp markdown — slides separated by --- lines.

skills.name: ONAMIX Get (anonymous browser fetch)
skills.description: MANDATORY when user shares a URL or asks to FETCH/OPEN/BACA/AMBIL/READ a web page (e.g. 'baca halaman X', 'ambil isi URL Y', 'buka link ini', 'open this link'). Returns parsed text + links + images + meta + status. Anonymous browser (no Chrome dependency). PREFER this over http_get (raw HTML noisy) and web_read (markdown only) for general URL fetching. PREFER over web_search when user already has a specific URL.

raw.description: Return raw HTML instead of parsed text.

skills.name: ONAMIX Search (multi-engine web search)
skills.description: MANDATORY for ANY web search request. PRIMARY search tool — use this WHENEVER the user asks to search, find, look up, cari, search di X, or browse for current information. Supports multi-engine search: 'wikipedia' (BEST for 'cari di wikipedia', 'apa itu X', encyclopedia queries — supports id+en), 'ddg/brave/bing/google' (general web), 'github' (code repos), 'hn' (Hacker News), 'multi' (aggregate wikipedia+hn+github+wiby for broadest coverage). Pick the engine that matches user intent: wikipedia for encyclopedia, github for code, ddg for general web, multi when unsure. CRITICAL — WIKIPEDIA RESPONSE PROTOCOL: When engine='wikipedia', the result contains 'answer_content' (full article extract) and 'source_url'. You MUST: (1) Read 'answer_content' fully, (2) Write a clear 3-5 sentence answer in Bahasa Indonesia summarising the key facts, (3) End with source: [Title](source_url). NEVER just list URLs — always synthesize the content into a readable answer.

query.description: Search query (Indonesian or English both work).

engine.description: Pick by intent: 'wikipedia' (encyclopedia/biographical/factual lookups — STRONG match for queries with 'wikipedia', 'apa itu', 'tentang', 'siapa'), 'ddg/brave/bing/google' (general web), 'github' (code), 'hn' (tech news/discussions), 'multi' (default — combines wikipedia+hn+github+wiby).

skills.name: ONAMIX Scrape (regex extract)
skills.description: Scrape a webpage and extract structured data using regex selectors. Use when you need specific fields (price, title, author, date) from a known page structure. Returns key-value extracted dict.

selectors.description: Map of {field_name: regex_pattern} to extract from HTML. Use capture groups (parens) to get just the value.

skills.name: ONAMIX POST
skills.description: Send POST request anonymously via ONAMIX (form-encoded or JSON body). Use for API calls, form submission, or scraping endpoints that require POST. Returns title + text + status code.

body.description: Request body — string for form, object for JSON.

json.description: Send as application/json (default: true if body is object).

skills.name: ONAMIX Crawl (multi-page)
skills.description: Crawl up to 50 pages from a seed URL within the same origin. Use to map a site or collect content across multiple pages. Returns list of {url, title, text} per page.

maxPages.description: Max pages to crawl (default 10, hard cap 50).

skills.name: ONAMIX History
skills.description: List recent ONAMIX fetch history (URLs visited this session). Use to debug, re-visit, or verify what the brain has already browsed. Optional filter by type.

skills.name: ONAMIX Links Extract
skills.description: Fetch a URL and return only its outgoing links (filtered by substring if provided). Cheaper than onamix_get when you only need link discovery, not content.

filter.description: Substring to filter links (matches URL or anchor text, case-insensitive).

skills.name: ONAMIX Config
skills.description: Get or set ONAMIX engine configuration (default search engine, user agent, proxy, etc.). Use sparingly — affects all subsequent ONAMIX calls.

get.description: Return current config (default: true if no 'set').

skills.name: ONAMIX Multi-Fetch (parallel)
skills.description: Fetch up to 10 URLs in parallel via ONAMIX. Use when you need content from multiple pages and want to save round-trip time. Returns array of {url, title, text, status} per URL.

raw.description: Return raw HTML instead of parsed text.

skills.name: Tavily Search
skills.description: MANDATORY untuk pencarian fakta real-time terpercaya. Lebih akurat dari onamix untuk pertanyaan faktual dan berita terkini.

skills.name: Google Search (Serper)
skills.description: Cari di Google via Serper API. Backup untuk tavily_search.

skills.name: Think (Structured Reasoning)
skills.description: MANDATORY untuk analisis kompleks, founder-intent translation, dan keputusan multi-faktor. ADO berpikir terstruktur. Mode: analyze|decide|debug|plan|critique.

skills.name: Synthesize (Multi-source)
skills.description: Sintesis dari beberapa sumber, ide mentah, atau bahasa founder non-teknis menjadi insight, konsep, roadmap, dan next action. Auto-search jika topic diberikan tanpa sources.

sources.description: Opsional: teks dari sumber yang sudah ada

skills.name: Ask Teacher AI
skills.description: Tanya teacher AI secara langsung: claude, kimi, gpt, atau gemini. Gunakan untuk second opinion atau validasi.

skills.name: Multi-Teacher Consultation
skills.description: Tanya 2-4 teacher sekaligus dan bandingkan jawaban. Untuk validasi dan perspektif beragam.

skills.name: Calculator
skills.description: MANDATORY untuk perhitungan matematika. Mendukung: +,-,*,/,**,%, sqrt, sin, cos, log, factorial, pi, e.

skills.name: Python Runner (Sandboxed)
skills.description: Jalankan kode Python dalam sandbox aman. Bisa: loop, list, string, math, json, datetime. Tidak bisa: os/sys/network.

skills.name: Extract Insights
skills.description: Ekstrak insight, pola, implikasi, dan sinyal strategis dari teks panjang. Gunakan setelah web_read, onamix_get, atau handoff/brief panjang.

skills.name: Knowledge Discovery (Self-Education)
skills.description: ADO belajar sendiri: cari topik, riset, sintesis, opsional simpan ke KB. Untuk ekspansi pengetahuan otomatis.

skills.name: Code Analyze
skills.description: MANDATORY untuk analisis kode: review kualitas, temukan bug, security issue, performance bottleneck, dan saran perbaikan. Dukung Python, JS/TS, SQL, Bash. Output: daftar issues (severity: critical/high/medium/low) + rekomendasi konkret.

skills.name: Code Debug
skills.description: MANDATORY untuk debug: terima kode + error message + context, hasilkan root cause analysis, step-by-step trace, dan solusi fix siap pakai. Lebih mendalam dari code_analyze — fokus pada error spesifik.

context.description: Informasi tambahan: environment, input, expected output

skills.name: Code Review (Full)
skills.description: Full code review seperti senior engineer: architecture, patterns, naming, tests, docs, security, performance. Output: structured review dengan LGTM / Request Changes + inline comments.

code.description: Kode yang ingin di-review (paste full file atau diff)

context.description: Tujuan kode ini, PR description, atau area fokus

skills.name: Propose Improvement (Dev Organ)
skills.description: MANDATORY ketika ADO menemukan masalah, bug, atau peluang perbaikan sistem: kirim improvement proposal ke Sandbox queue untuk direview Fahmi. Proposal akan muncul di Playground UI. Jangan perbaiki produksi langsung — selalu propose dulu.

problem.description: Masalah yang ditemukan — spesifik dan faktual
